description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort and keep dry and comfortable. This T-shirt, engineered with Climalite technology, offers you a flattering stylised look. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on your day off, or with shorts and Sports shoes when you're hitting the gym. Product Details White polo T-shirt, has a ribbed spread collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, branding on the left chest and vented hemline Material and Care 70% cotton and 30% polyester Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
